title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Software Without a Stripe Account — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: As a creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, you're well aware of the headaches that come with selling digital products using Stripe or PayPal. These platforms have strict geographic restrictions that block access to creators in your region, leaving you wondering how to get paid for your hard work. This post is for you – we'll explore the real difference between your choices for selling software without a Stripe account, and why one option stands out as the clear winner.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When you're looking for a Stripe alternative, Gumroad and Payhip might seem like viable options. However, upon closer inspection, you'll find that they both have their own set of limitations. Gumroad, for instance, requires you to have a Stripe account to receive payments, which defeats the purpose of finding a Stripe alternative. Payhip, on the other hand, charges high fees and has a clunky user interface that makes it difficult to manage sales. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers a complete store infrastructure, including Core Shop Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, all in one payment.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have strict geographic restrictions that block access to creators in certain countries. Gumroad and Payhip, while not as restrictive, still have limitations that make it difficult for creators in restricted countries to get paid. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's infrastructure is designed to be global and accessible to creators everywhere, without the need for a Stripe account or other payment processors. This means that you can sell your digital products without worrying about geographic restrictions or blocked payments.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, Unchained Commerce stands out as the clear winner. Our payment processor, NOWPayments, offers instant automated delivery and no fees for transactions over $100. In contrast, Gumroad charges high fees and takes up to 72 hours to process payments. Payhip also charges high fees and has a complex pricing structure that makes it difficult to understand the real costs. With Unchained Commerce, you can get paid quickly and easily, without worrying about hidden fees or complex pricing structures.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are critical for creators who want to sell digital products quickly and easily. Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine offers instant automated delivery, which means that customers can access their purchased products immediately after paying. In contrast, Gumroad and Payhip require manual intervention to deliver products, which can lead to delays and lost sales. With Unchained Commerce, you can automate delivery and focus on creating more content, without worrying about the logistics of delivering your products.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice between Gumroad, Payhip, and Unchained Commerce depends on your specific situation and needs. If you're looking for a complete store infrastructure that's global, accessible, and easy to use, then Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is the clear winner. If you're already invested in Gumroad or Payhip, then you may want to consider sticking with what you know, but be aware of the limitations and costs associated with these platforms.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
